events.label: assistant
events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: missing GFCI protection at wet/kitchen/garage receptacle locations is a **fail**, **high risk** — an active shock hazard on energized in-service circuits, violating NEC 210.8 (GFCI required at these locations) and 406.4(D) (GFCI must be added when replacing receptacles there), with 406.9 governing the wet-location receptacle requirements. Corrective action is GFCI receptacle/breaker installation and trip-testing before re-energizing.
